cards.title: Cardiovascular Exam
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Inspection: JVP, apex beat, precordium
  • Auscultation: S1/S2, murmur grading
  • Peripheral pulses (all 8 sites)
  • BP in both arms, ankle-brachial index

cards.title: Respiratory Exam
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Inspection: Chest shape, breathing pattern
  • Percussion: Dull vs resonant vs hyper-resonant
  • Auscultation: VBS, added sounds
  • 6-minute walk test

cards.title: Abdominal Exam
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Inspection: Distension, visible peristalsis
  • Percussion: Liver span, shifting dullness
  • Palpation: Organomegaly, guarding
  • Special tests: Murphy, McBurney, Rovsing

cards.title: Neurological Exam
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Cranial nerves I–XII systematic assessment
  • Motor: Tone, power (MRC 0-5), reflexes
  • Sensory: Light touch, pain, vibration, proprioception
  • Cerebellar: Finger-nose, heel-shin, Romberg

cards.title: MSK Exam
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • GALS screen (Gait, Arms, Legs, Spine)
  • Joint: Look, Feel, Move (active & passive)
  • Special tests by joint (Lachman, Neer, SLR)
  • Functional assessment

cards.title: Thyroid Exam
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Inspection from front and side
  • Palpation: Size, consistency, nodules, bruit
  • Pemberton sign for retrosternal goitre
  • Associated eye signs (exophthalmos, lid lag)

cards.title: Eye Exam
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Visual acuity (Snellen chart)
  • Visual fields (confrontation)
  • PERRLA assessment
  • Fundoscopy: disc, vessels, macula

cards.title: ENT Exam
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Ear: Otoscopy, whisper test
  • Nose: Septum deviation, turbinates, polyps
  • Throat: Tonsils grading, pharynx
  • Indirect laryngoscopy

cards.title: Gynaecological Exam
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Per abdomen: Uterus size, adnexal mass
  • Per speculum: Cervix inspection, discharge
  • Bimanual: Uterus, ovaries, POD tenderness
  • Cervical motion tenderness (CMT)

cards.title: Dermatology
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Primary lesions: Macule, papule, plaque, vesicle
  • Secondary lesions: Scales, crust, excoriation
  • Distribution pattern (dermatomal, photodistributed)
  • Dermoscopy basics

cards.title: General Examination
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Handshake examination (clubbing, tremor)
  • Lymph node assessment (all groups)
  • Pallor, icterus, cyanosis, oedema
  • Height, weight, BMI, waist circumference
